q_quant_rationale: The analysis compares campaign vs non-campaign days (two observed groups) rather than comparing an observed value to an expected/baseline/typical/assumed value, so criterion (a) is not met.
q_aware_rationale: The analysis correctly reports the AOVs (12,616.93 vs 9,693.25) and counts (1,834 vs 484), and provides a clear verdict that the hypothesis is supported.
